Impact Coaching
Medical Weight Loss
🄯 Client Hub Link
Share this link with clients so they can access the Medical Weight Loss Hub.
https://impact-coaching-pt.github.io/PT-App/medical-weight-loss-hub.html
ℹ About MWL
Medical Weight Loss clients receive a tailored fitness and lifestyle programme alongside their medication. The hub gives them free access to NHS-backed guidance on exercise, nutrition, side effects and more.
MWL Hub QR
Clients scan this to open the MWL Hub on their phone.

Google Drive Sync
Works offline always. When on wifi, tap Sync to push/pull all data across devices.

⚠️ Use the Web App URL — from "Manage Deployments" → your deployment → Web app → URL (starts with script.google.com/macros/s/). Do NOT use the Library URL.
Web App URL (ends with /exec)
Your Name (shown on client notes)
Never saved to Drive
Setup (one-time, ~5 mins):
1. Go to script.google.com → New Project
2. Paste the code below, replacing everything
3. Click Deploy → New deployment → Web App
4. Execute as: Me · Access: Anyone
5. Authorise → copy the URL → paste above
Backup
